name: hotelops-scraper
description: Choice Advantage -> Supabase scraper for HotelOps AI / Staxis
_comment_on_pinning: Exact versions (no ^ or ~) for the scraper because Railway auto-rebuilds on every push and a silent minor bump in Playwright/supabase-js can break a working scraper without anyone noticing until a stale-pull alert fires hours later. The cost of upgrading manually is minutes; the cost of a silent break is a missed shift.
